description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped cardboard storage box with medium brown coloring and a simple, sturdy construction. The front face of the box is decorated with hand-drawn black marker text reading 'BEST friends' along with a heart, lines, and a smiley face, giving it a personalized and playful appearance. Inside the box, there are two visible objects: a round, mottled stone and a retro-style game controller with colored buttons, suggesting the box is used for storing personal or sentimental items. The box has no visible handles, lid, or locking mechanism, and the interior is plain and unlined. The exterior surfaces are matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard. This box would likely be found in informal urban settings such as garages, bedrooms, or community spaces where personal storage is needed.
description: A brown cardboard storage box with hand-drawn 'BEST friends' text and playful decorations on the front, containing a stone and a retro game controller inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BEST friends' text, heart, and lines drawn in black marker, with both the stone and game controller visible inside.
description_view_1: Rear view showing a plain brown cardboard surface with only the stone visible inside the box.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a blank brown cardboard surface with no visible contents or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the game controller inside, with no exterior markings or decorations.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: hand-drawn marker text and decorations on front
